name: Central Ethiopia Regional State (Ethiopia)
description: Three horizontal bands of green, white, and red, with a ring of ten blue five-pointed stars on the central white band.
history: The Central Ethiopia Regional State was formed in August 2023 from several zones and special woredas of the former Southern Nations, Nationalities, and Peoples' Region; its capital is Hosaena. As a newly created region it had not yet been assigned an ISO 3166-2 code.

features.role: ring of stars on the central band
